mapper.sql: id, name, code, description, category, steps_json::text as steps_json, params_schema::text as params_schema, is_builtin, is_enabled, version, creator_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_workflows WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM ai_workflows WHERE code = #{code} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_workflows ( name, code, description, category, steps_json, params_schema, is_builtin, is_enabled, version, creator_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{category}, #{stepsJson}::jsonb, #{paramsSchema}::jsonb, #{isBuiltin}, #{isEnabled}, #{version}, #{creatorId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_workflows SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
